endpoints.name: Get all Languages
endpoints.description: Retrieves all the Languages that the authenticated user or client has permission to access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add a new Language
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Upsert (create or replace) a Language
endpoints.description: Creates a Language if it does not yet exist (i.e. if the resource does not have an `id` property yet), or replaces the existing Language resource if it does. Note that this replaces the *entire* Language. It is not a partial update.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a Language by ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Delete a Language by ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Perform a partial update on a Language
endpoints.description: Performs a partial update the Language whose ID is specified in the URL. If the Language object has an `id` property, is ignored in favor of the ID in the URL.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Get all Lexemes for a Language
endpoints.description: Get all Lexemes for a Language
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Add a new Lexeme to a Language
endpoints.description: Add a new Lexeme to a Language
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Upsert (add or replace) a Lexeme
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Get a Lexeme by ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LEXEMEID}} with a real lexemeid. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Delete a Lexeme by ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LEXEMEID}} with a real lexemeid. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Perform a partial update on a Lexeme
endpoints.description: Perform a partial update on a Lexeme
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LEXEMEID}} with a real lexemeid. Replace {{LANGUAGEID}} with a real languageid.

endpoints.name: Get all Lexemes
endpoints.description: Retrieve all Lexemes that the authenticated user has permission to access. Include a `languageID` query parameter to limit results to Lexemes from a particular Language.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add a new Lexeme
endpoints.description: Add a new Lexeme. A `languageID` must be provided either as a query parameter, or as an attribute on the Lexeme body.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Upsert (add or replace) a Lexeme
endpoints.description: Upsert (add or replace) a Lexeme. A `languageID` must be provided either as a query parameter, or as an attribute on the Lexeme body.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get a Lexeme by ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LEXEMEID}} with a real lexemeid.

endpoints.name: Delete a Lexeme by ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LEXEMEID}} with a real lexemeid.

endpoints.name: Perform a partial update on a Lexeme
endpoints.description: Perform a partial update on a Lexeme.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DIGITALLINGUISTICS_API_KEY}} with your DIGITALLINGUISTICS API KEY. Replace {{LEXEMEID}} with a real lexemeid.
